source_status: public frontier scan with research-institution and benchmark sources
missingness: platform-specific workbench claims rely on secondary reporting
revision_reason: Add interoperability requirement so research claims preserve the executable tool path, not only the source citation path.
implementation_status: schema, validator, fixture, and tests committed
falsification_route: A reviewer should fail this gate if the declared toolchain cannot reconstruct the source-to-claim path or if privacy boundaries are unclear.
next_executable_action: Run the regression test file for this gate from the repository root.

toolchain_components.name: literature_database
toolchain_components.role: retrieve and preserve source identifiers for biomedical or veterinary evidence

toolchain_components.name: notebook_or_script_runner
toolchain_components.role: execute analysis or validation code against synthetic or public data

toolchain_components.name: provenance_logger
toolchain_components.role: record tool calls, versions, inputs, outputs, and blocked inferences

human_review_role: reviewer verifies toolchain reconstructability and privacy boundary before promotion
blocked_inferences: does not validate any private health record
